items.notes: All variants evaluated on the same token subset from the same processed panel.
Same train_ratio applied consistently across all variants.
Same forecast horizon used for all variants.
No target scaling mismatch across variants.
Same chronological split indices used for all variants.
Features use lagged prices, rolling sentiment, and causal graph features only.
No evidence of test-period information leaking into training.
First-order MAML support and query sets are drawn chronologically from the training period.
